pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 13 removes file at this path, export_result.sh line 10 checks for file at this path, verifier.py line 56 expects file at this path
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 21 creates file at this path, verifier.py line 42 reads from this path
Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 26-31 define CASES array with exactly 4 elements, lines 35-75 loop creates one case per array element

privileged_info_summary: The task creates 4 synthetic complaint cases via ArkCase REST API with the following verified details: (1) 'Delayed Response to Records Request' (High priority), (2) 'Missing Attachments in Public Filing' (Medium priority), (3) 'Urgent Data Breach Notification Failure' (Expedite priority), (4) 'Minor Formatting Error in Published Report' (Low priority). Cases are created programmatically by setup_task.sh and stored in ground truth at /tmp/ground_truth_complaints.json. The agent must identify all 4 cases and create a report file at /home/ga/audit_report.txt containing Case Number, Title, and Priority for each case.
